title: dampiera oligophylla
intro: Dampiera oligophylla, also known as the blue forget-me-not or small blue forget-me-not, is a small flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dampiera oligophylla include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially treating conditions such as arthritis and eczema. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
